theme_strategy.name: Neo-Noir Casino: Buenos Aires Underground
theme_strategy.description: A high-stakes, shadow-drenched aesthetic that blends traditional Argentine card culture with a futuristic, underground poker club vibe. Think 'Blade Runner' meets 'San Telmo'.

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Game Action Calls (TRUCO!)

body.usage: UI elements, chat, dashboard data, rules text

mono.usage: Betting amounts, Server hash codes, Timer countdowns

primary.description: Gold - Used for Wins, Money, 'Envido' calls

secondary.description: Emerald - Used for Table felt, Success, 'Quiero' actions

accent.description: Crimson - Used for 'Truco' calls, Alerts, 'No Quiero'

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Bento' Grid Protocol (Mode A for Landing, Mode B for Dashboard)

containers.game_table: w-full h-screen overflow-hidden flex flex-col justify-between

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/20 transition-all duration-300 font-bold tracking-wide uppercase
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 border border-secondary/20 text-secondary hover:bg-secondary/20 transition-all duration-300
buttons.game_action: rounded-full w-24 h-24 flex items-center justify-center font-black text-xl shadow-2xl border-4 border-white/10 active:scale-95 transition-transform

cards.dashboard: bg-card text-card-foreground border-border/40 shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300
cards.playing_card: aspect-[2/3] bg-white rounded-md shadow-xl border border-gray-200 relative overflow-hidden transform hover:-translate-y-4 transition-transform duration-300

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 placeholder:text-white/20 h-12

media.icon_style: Duotone or Thin weight for elegance

accessibility.screen_readers: All game actions (Envido, Truco) must have aria-labels describing the current game state risk.

3d_libraries.preferred: None (Use CSS 3D Transforms for Cards to ensure performance on mobile)
3d_libraries.optional: Three.js (via R3F) ONLY for the Hero Section background (floating particles/chips)

instructions_to_main_agent: Install dependencies: `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`
Set up the Tailwind colors in `index.css` using CSS variables to allow for dynamic theme adjustments if needed.

For the Truco Cards: Do not try to generate images. Use standard playing card logic (CSS borders, ranks, suits) or a sprite sheet if you can find one via external URL. For MVP, CSS-based cards are acceptable.
Game Table Logic: The table should be `fixed` position or 100vh to prevent scrolling during play.
Chat: Must be a drawer on mobile (slide-up) and a sidebar on desktop.
Admin Panel: Use a simplified 'High Density' grid. Don't make it too flashy; keep it functional but within the dark theme.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
